author: RK-Media
description: A Milanote-style visual workspace with icon tiles, freeform canvas, kanban columns, sticky notes, checklists, images, audio, bookmarks, and note links. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: RK-Media
manifest.description: A Milanote-style visual workspace: icon tiles, freeform canvas, sticky notes, checklists, kanban columns, images, audio, bookmarks, and note links.
manifest.name: Icon Board

name: Icon Board

releases.author: RK-Admin-01
releases.description:
## Changes

- Fix CSS lint warnings: remove all !important declarations and merge duplicate selectors
- Fix unnecessary type assertions and unsafe any assignments flagged by the Obsidian validator
- Shorten manifest description to fit within 250-character limit
- Fix pre-existing bug: context bar tile-edit was passing wrong arguments to TileModal
releases.name: Icon Board 1.0.1
